attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT	DISTINCT ST.OBJECT_ID        as	OBJECT_ID        ,
		ST.DISCOUNT_ID      as	DISCOUNT_ID      ,
		ST.POST_TERM_CLAUSE_FLAG   as	POST_TERM_CLAUSE_FLAG  ,
		ST.APPLIED_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID     	as	APPLIED_PRODUCT_FAMILY_ID ,
		ST.PROMO_VERSION    as	PROMO_VERSION    ,
		ST.APPR_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG   as	APPR_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG  ,
		ST.REQ_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG    as	REQ_NS_DISCOUNT_PCTG   ,
		ST.MODIFIER_LINE_ID as	MODIFIER_LINE_ID ,
		ST.DISC_PERCENTAGE  as	DISC_PERCENTAGE  ,
		ST.DISC_AMOUNT      as	DISC_AMOUNT      ,
		ST.PRICE_USED_FOR_ADJUSTMENT     	as	PRICE_USED_FOR_ADJUSTMENT ,
		ST.NET_PRICE_AFT_ADJUSTMENT      	as	NET_PRICE_AFT_ADJUSTMENT  ,
		ST.PRICING_PHASE_CODE      as	PRICING_PHASE_CODE  ,
		ST.MODIFIEDER_LINE_TYPE_CODE     	as	MODIFIEDER_LINE_TYPE_CODE ,
		ST.LIST_LINE_NUMBER as	LIST_LINE_NUMBER ,
		ST.INCLUDE_ON_RETURN_FLAG  as	INCLUDE_ON_RETURN_FLAG ,
		ST.DISC_METHOD      as	DISC_METHOD      ,
		ST.MODIFIER_LEVEL_CODE     as	MODIFIER_LEVEL_CODE ,
		ST.BUCKET           as	BUCKET           ,
		ST.AUTOMATIC_FLAG   as	AUTOMATIC_FLAG   ,
		ST.UPDATE_ALLOWABLE_FLAG   as	UPDATE_ALLOWABLE_FLAG  ,
		ST.UPDATED_FLAG     as	UPDATED_FLAG     ,
		ST.APPLIED_FLAG     as	APPLIED_FLAG     ,
		ST.PRINT_ON_INVOICE_FLAG   as	PRINT_ON_INVOICE_FLAG  ,
		ST.CHANGE_REASON_CODE      as	CHANGE_REASON_CODE  ,
		ST.CHANGE_REASON_TEXT      as	CHANGE_REASON_TEXT  ,
		ST.PROMOTION_CODE   as	PROMOTION_CODE   ,
		ST.PROMOTION_NAME   as	PROMOTION_NAME   ,
		ST.CHANNER_PROG_ALLIGNMENT as	CHANNER_PROG_ALLIGNMENT   ,
		ST.MODIFIED_FROM	   as	MODIFIED_FROM	   ,
		ST.MODIFIED_TO      as	MODIFIED_TO      ,
		ST.ESTIMATED_FLAG   as	ESTIMATED_FLAG   ,
		ST.CHARGE_TYPE_CODE as	CHARGE_TYPE_CODE ,
		ST.CHARGE_SUBTYPE_CODE     as	CHARGE_SUBTYPE_CODE ,
		ST.RANGE_BREAK_QUANTITY    as	RANGE_BREAK_QUANTITY   ,
		ST.ACCURAL_CONVERSION_RATE as	ACCURAL_CONVERSION_RATE   ,
		ST.ACCURAL_FLAG     as	ACCURAL_FLAG     ,
		ST.BENEFIT_QUANTITY as	BENEFIT_QUANTITY ,
		ST.BENEFIT_UOM_CODE as	BENEFIT_UOM_CODE ,
		ST.PRICE_BREAK_TYPE_CODE   as	PRICE_BREAK_TYPE_CODE  ,
		ST.SUBSTITUTION_ATTRIBUTE  as	SUBSTITUTION_ATTRIBUTE ,
		ST.PRORATION_TYPE_CODE     as	PRORATION_TYPE_CODE ,
		ST.CREDIT_OR_CHARGE_FLAG   as	CREDIT_OR_CHARGE_FLAG  ,
		ST.INC_IN_SALES_PERFORMANCE      	as	INC_IN_SALES_PERFORMANCE  ,
		ST.REBATE_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE  	as	REBATE_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE  	,
		ST.REBATE_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE  	as	REBATE_TRANSACTION_REFERENCE  	,
		ST.REBATE_PAYMENT_SYSTEM_CODE    	as	REBATE_PAYMENT_SYSTEM_CODE    	,
		ST.OPERAND_PER_QUANTITY    as	OPERAND_PER_QUANTITY   ,
		ST.ADJUSTED_AMT_PER_QUANTITY     	as	ADJUSTED_AMT_PER_QUANTITY ,
		CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(ST.EXPIRATION_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0))  as	EXPIRATION_DATE  ,
		ST.LIST_LINE_ID     as	LIST_LINE_ID     ,
		ST.DISC_NAME        as	DISC_NAME        ,
		ST.ADJUST_PRICE_LIST_AMT   as	ADJUST_PRICE_LIST_AMT  ,
		ST.ADJUSTED_AMOUNT  as	ADJUSTED_AMOUNT  ,
		CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(ST.UPDATED_DATE,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as UPDATED_DATE,
		ST.UPDATED_BY       as	UPDATED_BY       ,
		CAST(LEFT(OREPLACE(ST.CREATION_DT,'T',' '), 19) as TIMESTAMP(0)) as	CREATION_DT      ,
		ST.CREATED_BY       as	CREATED_BY       ,
		ST.MODIFIER_HEADER_ID      as	MODIFIER_HEADER_ID  ,
		ST.QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID    as	QUOTE_LINE_OBJECT_ID   ,
		ST.CONCESSION_ID    as	CONCESSION_ID    ,
		ST.CONCESSION_TYPE  as	CONCESSION_TYPE  ,
		ST.CONCESSION_VALUE as	CONCESSION_VALUE ,
		ST.CONCESSION_VALUE_TYPE   as	CONCESSION_VALUE_TYPE  ,
		ST.CONCESSION_APPLIED      as	CONCESSION_APPLIED  ,
		ST.DISCOUNT_VERSION as	DISCOUNT_VERSION ,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as	EDW_UPDATED_DATE ,
		ST.UPDATED_BY_KAFKA as UPDATED_BY_KAFKA,
		cast(left (ST.UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,19) as timestamp(0)) as UPDATED_ON_KAFKA,
		ST.OFFSET_NUMBER as OFFSET_NUMBER,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) as EDW_CREATE_DTM,
		USER as EDW_CREATE_USER,
		ST.PARTITION_NUMBER as	PARTITION_NUMBER ,
		ST.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER,
		CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
		USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER 
FROM	$$STGDB.ST_INT_RW_CQ_QT_LN_CNCS_KFK_FF ST  
Where NOT EXISTS (
	SELECT	1 FROM	$$ETLVWDB.EL_INT_RW_CQ_QUTE_LN_CNCS_KFKA EL 
		WHERE	ST.OBJECT_ID = EL.OBJECT_ID  
		AND ST.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER = EL.MESSAGE_SEQUENCE_NUMBER 
		AND ST.OFFSET_NUMBER  =EL.OFFSET_NUMBER  /*performance recommendations */
		)
